.gitignore.summary: This file contains patterns for Git to ignore, typically used to exclude build artifacts, dependencies, and environment-specific files from version control.

index.html.summary: This HTML file sets up the basic structure for a web application called 'Dynamic Mask Changer,' linking necessary CSS and JavaScript files.

main.js.summary: This script continuously changes the background color and opacity of an HTML element with the ID 'mask' at a rapid interval.

package-lock.json.summary: This file is a package lock file that records the exact dependency tree and versions used by the project, ensuring reproducible builds.

package.json.summary: This file provides metadata, dependencies, and scripts for a Node.js project, defining how the project can be run and what packages it requires.

style.css.summary: This CSS file provides styling for the body and a specific element with the ID 'mask', centering content and defining the appearance of the mask element.
